jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Rivigo - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Rivigo invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!
